title: Tea Leaf
description: A small mod which adds tea to minecraft
body: ## A mod which adds tea to minecraft Harvest leaves to brew fragrant tea! Mix water and a leaf into a kettle which is placed over a heat source, to brew tea! You can also sniff leaves to get a strong whiff of fragrance. ![A tea kettle boiling tea in a cherry blossom biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ade1809cd3cef239e4492ed9ecdf123411615507.png) Join the discord for issues/help :)
